note: Only public media and text authored by the business profile were retained. Third-party comments and commenter identities were intentionally excluded.

messages:
🏁🔥 Introducing the Moto Mayhem Rodeo🔥🏁
Get ready, Ione! For the very first time ever, the Ed Hughes Memorial Arena will host a dirt bike event like no other on July 25th!
Watch youth riders put their skills to the test in three exciting rodeo-style dirt bike events:
🏍️ Barrel Racing
🏍️ Single Stake
🏍️ Pole Whipping
This action-packed event combines the excitement of motocross with the tradition of rodeo, creating a one-of-a-kind experience that will draw riders, families, and spectators from across the region.

🌟 Local Business Sponsorship Opportunity 🌟
We are currently seeking event sponsors to help launch this exciting new community tradition! Sponsorships are available for just $250, offering an affordable way to showcase your business while supporting local youth and family-friendly recreation.
As a sponsor, your business will gain valuable visibility through event promotions, social media recognition, and exposure to attendees throughout the event. It’s a great opportunity to connect with local families, strengthen your community presence, and demonstrate your commitment to supporting hometown events.
By partnering with the Moto Mayhem Rodeo, you’ll not only help make this inaugural event a success—you’ll also position your business in front of an engaged local audience and be part of an exciting new tradition in Ione.
If you’re interested in becoming a sponsor, please reach out to us for more information. We’d love to partner with you!
Maegan Milovina 209-418-5312
Alyssa Prather 209-338-4012

Mark your calendars and bring the whole family! We can’t wait to see everyone on July 25th for this high-energy, dirt-slingin, adrenaline-pumping event.

For event updates, announcements, and additional information, be sure to follow our Facebook page.

Moto Mayhem Rodeo — Where Dirt Bikes Meet Rodeo! 🤘🏁💨⚡️

⭐️REGISTRATION IS OFFICIALLY OPEN⭐️

Below is the Moto Mayhem Rodeo Registration Packet! Please fill out and return to MotoMayhemRodeo@yahoo.com.

🏁 Registration packets MUST be signed and initialed by parent/guardian of rider.

🏁 Back numbers will only be assigned once rider’s completed registration packet and entry fee is received. Back numbers are handed out at check-in.

🏁 Venmo link is included in the registration packet.

🏁 If you would like a PDF version, please email MotoMayhemRodeo@yahoo.com.

🏁 Pre-Registration closes July 13, 2026.

🏁 Event patterns are included in the registration packet so riders can become familiar with each pattern.

For any questions, please text Maegan (209) 418-5312 or Alyssa (209) 338-4012, email MotoMayhemRodeo@yahoo.com, or message the Moto Mayhem Rodeo Facebook page!

🏁🔥 Sponsor Spotlight! 🔥🏁

A huge THANK YOU to CE Barrel Racing Association for sponsoring the Moto Mayhem Rodeo 2026 50cc Ages 4–6 Championship Buckle! 🏍️🏆🤠

Your generosity helps make it possible for our youngest riders to chase their dreams, build confidence, and create unforgettable memories in the arena. We are so grateful for your support! ❤️💙

Be sure to show CE Barrel Racing Association some love and support! 👏🐎

#MotoMayhemRodeo2026 #SponsorSpotlight #ThankYou #CEBarrelRacingAssociation #FutureChampions #50ccRacing #CommunityStrong 🏁🏍️🏆

🔥🏁 SPONSOR SHOUT OUT!! 🏁🔥

🤘💥 A HUGE THANK YOU to Milovina Construction 🚧🚜 for sponsoring the Moto Mayhem Rodeo 2026 65cc Ages 7–9 Champion Buckle! 🏆🏍️💨

❤️ We are beyond grateful for your support! Sponsors like Milovina Construction help make this event possible and give these young riders the opportunity to compete for an awesome championship buckle! 🏅👏

⚡ Be sure to support the businesses that support our youth community! Whether it’s big projects or quality craftsmanship, Milovina Construction is helping build more than custom projects—they’re helping build opportunities for our future riders! 🚧💪

🙌 Thank you again, Milovina Construction, for being part of the Moto Mayhem family! We couldn’t do it without amazing sponsors like you! ❤️🏍️🔥

🏁💥 Ride Hard • Cause Mayhem • Have Fun! 💥🏁
#MotoMayhemRodeo2026 #SponsorShoutOut #MilovinaConstruction #65cc #FutureChampions 🏍️🏆🤘

🦌 Whether it’s preserving unforgettable memories from the outdoors or supporting the next generation of riders, Death Rattle Taxidermy is making a lasting impact in our community! 💪🔥

🙌 Be sure to support the businesses that support our riders! Thank you, Death Rattle Taxidermy, for being part of the Moto Mayhem family! ❤️🏍️🤘

🎉🏁 IT’S OFFICIALLY MOTO MAYHEM MONTH!! 🏁🎉

The countdown is ON! 🤘🏍️💨 Moto Mayhem Rodeo 2026 is just around the corner, and we couldn’t be more excited to see everyone at the arena for an action-packed weekend of racing, competition, and unforgettable memories! 🔥💪

🏆 Whether you’re chasing a championship buckle, cheering from the sidelines, or coming out to enjoy all the excitement, there’s something for everyone at Moto Mayhem Rodeo!

📝 If you’re planning to compete, now is the perfect time to get your pre-registration and entry fees turned in! Getting entered early helps us prepare for an awesome event and keeps everything running smoothly on race day. 🙌

We can’t wait to see everyone and welcome some new faces to the Moto Mayhem family! ❤️🏍️

Who’s ready to kick off an unforgettable month?! 👇🔥

🏁💥 Ride Hard • Cause Mayhem • Have Fun! 💥🏁

#MotoMayhemRodeo2026 #MotoMayhemMonth #RideHardCauseMayhemHaveFun #SeeYouAtTheRodeo 🏍️🤘🔥

🙌 Be sure to support the businesses that support our riding community! Thank you, Gold N Son’s Trucking & Ready Mix, for being part of the Moto Mayhem family! ❤️🏍️🤘

Pre-registration ensures a smooth and quick check-in on event day!

👕 Custom Moto Mayhem T-shirts are first come, first serve, and pre-registered riders get priority.
Don’t wait—secure your spot today! We can’t wait to see everyone at Moto Mayhem Rodeo! 🤘🏍️

🔥🏁 10 DAYS TO GO! 🏁🔥

The countdown is officially ON! 🤘 In just 10 days, the gates will open for the 2026 Moto Mayhem Rodeo, and we can’t wait to see everyone! 🏍️💨

Whether you’re racing, cheering from the sidelines, or just coming out for the fun, there’s something for everyone!

✅ Pre-register if you haven’t already!
✅ Double-check your gear and bike.
✅ Tag your riding buddies and make sure they’re coming!

Who’s ready to bring the MAYHEM?! 😈🔥

📍 Ione, California
🗓️ July 25, 2026

#MotoMayhemRodeo #10DaysToGo #CountdownToMayhem #DirtBikes #MotoRodeo #RideHard #IoneCA #TwoWheelsPureMayhem

⚡️🏍️ SPONSOR SPOTLIGHT! 🏍️⚡️

A huge THANK YOU to Hall’s Electric for powering up the 2026 Moto Mayhem Rodeo as one of our incredible sponsors! 🔌💙

Your support helps make this event possible and allows us to provide an unforgettable experience for our riders, families, and fans. We truly appreciate your commitment to our local motorsports community!

If you’re looking for quality electrical services, be sure to support the businesses that support our events!
